description_long: This is a tan-colored formal dress shoe with a woven texture on the upper and smooth leather accents along the sides and heel. The shoe features a closed lacing system with thin, round laces threaded through five pairs of eyelets. The toe is slightly elongated and rounded, giving it a classic, elegant silhouette suitable for business or formal occasions. The sole and heel are made of a solid, slightly darker material, likely leather or synthetic, providing a subtle contrast to the upper. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A tan formal dress shoe with a woven-texture upper, smooth leather accents, and closed lacing. The shoe has a classic, elegant silhouette and a solid, slightly darker sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the woven texture, smooth leather heel, and the full length of the shoe with visible laces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and woven pattern on the upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the woven texture, smooth heel, and the shoe's overall slim profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid heel, back seam, and a glimpse of the laces overhanging the back.
